description: Validate treatment-plan content quality against SMART goals, evidence-based practice, patient-centered care, safety/risk, and medication documentation, plus ICD-10 codes, timeframes, measurable metrics, and readability. Read-only.
rules: read-only: never modifies the input plan
stdlib only (re, argparse) — no third-party deps
full quality report written to record_store/quality.txt
usage: Set PLAN_FILE to a .tex treatment plan. Output: quality.txt.
limitation: Heuristic regex scoring — it cannot judge true clinical accuracy. The core exits non-zero when quality <70%; the porter still records the report.
